name: COTY INC.
business: Coty Inc. is a beauty company that sells fragrances, color cosmetics, and skin and body care products to consumers through a multi-channel distribution network including prestige retailers, mass retailers, e-commerce, and travel retail.
sellsTo: prestige retailers (perfumeries, department stores, duty-free shops)
mass retailers (hypermarkets, supermarkets, drug stores, pharmacies)

exposures.sentence: Coty Inc. is one of the world's largest beauty companies with an iconic portfolio of brands across fragrance, color cosmetics, and skin and body care.
We continue to focus on expanding our e-commerce and direct-to-consumer channels.

We are increasingly dependent on information technology, and if we are unable to protect against service interruptions, corruption of our data and privacy protections, cyber-based attacks or network security breaches, our operations could be disrupted.

catalysts.sentence: During the third quarter of fiscal 2025, we formulated a new plan, which was announced on April 24, 2025, to strengthen our operating model and simplify our fixed cost structure (the Fixed Cost Reduction Plan).
